backend/main.mo: Main backend actor defining Restaurant and UserProfile types, hardcoded restaurant data for Mesa County, and public query/update methods for managing user profiles, visited restaurants, ratings, and notes with authorization mixin.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining old actor state types (OldRestaurant, OldUserProfile, maps for visited/notes/ratings) with a run function that currently passes through the old state unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the visited button implementation in RestaurantCard.tsx that turns solid green and persists status via useMarkVisited mutation hook.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including routing, authentication, restaurant search/filtering, geolocation, seasonal utilities, and UI components with Western Colorado rustic styling.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using a Western Colorado rustic palette (desert sand, canyon red, sage brush, weathered wood).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with title 'Mesa County Hidden Eats' and root div mounting the React application from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration with root Layout route, index DirectoryPage route at '/', and dynamic RestaurantDetailPage route at '/restaurant/$name'.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout with sticky header containing logo/title and login/logout button, profile setup dialog for first-time authenticated users, main content outlet, and footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantCard.t: Restaurant card component with image, hidden gem badge, distance display, seasonal badges, visited button that turns solid green when clicked (persisting via useMarkVisited), vibe tags, and 'Claim My Business' mailto link.
frontend/src/components/RestaurantList.t: Displays a grid of restaurant cards with loading skeletons and empty state handling. Accepts props for restaurants array, loading state, distance display, and seasonal highlighting.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Provides search input, cuisine filter buttons (American, Mexican, Japanese, etc.), and vibe filter toggles (pet-friendly, riverfront trail, date-friendly). Manages filter state through callback props.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages the backend actor instance with authentication, initializing access control with admin token from URL params. Invalidates dependent queries when actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality and identity state management. Creates AuthClient with custom options and handles identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for restaurant data (getAll, searchByName, searchByCuisine), user profiles, visited restaurants, and ratings. Includes mutations for saving profiles, marking visits, and submitting ratings.
frontend/src/hooks/useRestaurantSearch.t: Combines restaurant queries with client-side filtering logic for search query, cuisine, vibe filters (pet-friendly, riverfront, date), and seasonal mode. Returns filtered and sorted restaurant list.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color palette inspired by Western Colorado desert tones (canyon red, sage, sandstone). Includes light and dark mode theme variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component into the root DOM element.
frontend/src/pages/DirectoryPage.tsx: Main directory page component that displays a searchable, filterable list of restaurants with features for cuisine filtering, vibe filters, seasonal mode, and geolocation-based "Find Near Me" functionality. Includes authentication state handling with loading and error states.
Restaurant detail page component that displays full information for a single restaurant, including user-specific features like star ratings and personal notes. Handles authentication, seasonal status display, and loading/error states.
frontend/src/utils/geolocation.ts: Geolocation utility functions that get user location via browser API, calculate distances between coordinates using the Haversine formula, and filter/sort restaurants by proximity within a specified radius.
frontend/src/utils/seasonal.ts: Seasonal utility functions for formatting month ranges into readable strings, checking if restaurants are currently in season, and providing appropriate badge styling based on seasonal status.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter utilities for extracting query parameters from both regular and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state like admin tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with custom fonts (Lato/Merriweather), animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a mobile-friendly restaurant directory app called 'Mesa County Hidden Eats' with Western Colorado aesthetic. Contains architectural notes, known issues, existing features (directory interface, search, visual design, user profiles, geolocation), and pending features (business claims, seasonal availability, vibe attributes).
